name: Agent TARS
description: ByteDance's multimodal AI agent for desktop and browser automation — controls GUIs, browsers, and shell via vision and MCP tools. Available as npm CLI and desktop app.

skills.name: GUI Control
skills.description: Control desktop application interfaces using vision-based element detection, clicking, and keyboard input.

skills.name: Browser Agent
skills.description: Navigate websites, fill forms, click elements, and extract data from web pages autonomously via the browser.

skills.name: Shell Execution
skills.description: Execute shell commands and scripts as part of multi-step agent workflows with streamed output support.

skills.name: MCP Tool Integration
skills.description: Connect to local or remote MCP servers and invoke their tools as steps in multi-tool agent pipelines.
